description: Fragment of a letter from Toviyya (Tobias) b. Moshe, ca. 1050. In poetical Hebrew. Dating: ca. 1050 CE. Verso: Receipt or accounts. (Information from CUDL.) Note that DK 166 is the incorrect shelfmark; the current shelfmark may be DK M61, but the M series fragments are missing.
description_he: שבר מכתב מטוביה בן משה, בערך 1050, בעברית פיוטית.
